    <h1 {...{
      "id": "brand-concierge-style-guide-android"
    }}>{`Brand Concierge Style Guide (Android)`}</h1>
    <p>{`This document provides a comprehensive reference for all styling properties supported by the Brand Concierge Android SDK. Themes are configured using JSON files that follow a web-compatible CSS variable format.`}</p>
    <InlineAlert variant="warning" slots="text" mdxType="InlineAlert" />
    <p><strong parentName="p">{`Implementation Status`}</strong>{`: While the theme system parses all CSS variables for web compatibility, not all properties are currently used in the Android UI. See the `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "#implementation-status"
      }}>{`Implementation Status`}</a>{` section for detailed information on which properties are actively rendered versus defined but unused.`}</p>
    <hr></hr>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "overview"
    }}>{`Overview`}</h2>
    <p>{`The theme configuration is loaded from a JSON file using `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`ConciergeThemeLoader.load(context, filename)`}</inlineCode>{`. The framework supports CSS-like variable names (prefixed with `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`--`}</inlineCode>{`) that are automatically mapped to native Kotlin properties.`}</p>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "loading-a-theme"
    }}>{`Loading a theme`}</h3>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-kotlin"
      }}>{`// Load from app assets
val theme = ConciergeThemeLoader.load(context, "theme-default")

// Use default theme
val defaultTheme = ConciergeThemeLoader.default()
`}</code></pre>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "applying-a-theme"
    }}>{`Applying a theme`}</h3>
    <p>{`Apply the theme using the `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`ConciergeTheme`}</inlineCode>{` composable:`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-kotlin"
      }}>{`import androidx.compose.runtime.Composable
import androidx.compose.runtime.remember
import androidx.compose.ui.platform.LocalContext
import com.adobe.marketing.mobile.concierge.ui.theme.ConciergeTheme
import com.adobe.marketing.mobile.concierge.ui.theme.ConciergeThemeLoader

@Composable
fun MyApp() {
    val context = LocalContext.current
    
    // Load theme from assets
    val theme = remember {
        ConciergeThemeLoader.load(context, "my-theme") 
            ?: ConciergeThemeLoader.default()
    }
    
    ConciergeTheme(theme = theme) {
        // Your app content here
        // Concierge UI components will use the theme
    }
}
`}</code></pre>
    <p>{`You can also load themes by filename directly:`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-kotlin"
      }}>{`@Composable
fun MyApp() {
    ConciergeTheme(themeFileName = "my-theme.json") {
        // Your app content here
    }
}
`}</code></pre>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "applying-a-theme-in-xmlviews"
    }}>{`Applying a theme in XML/Views`}</h3>
    <p>{`For XML-based apps using `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`ConciergeChatView`}</inlineCode>{`, pass the theme when binding:`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-kotlin"
      }}>{`class MainActivity : AppCompatActivity() {
    override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
        super.onCreate(savedInstanceState)
        setContentView(R.layout.activity_main)
        
        // Load theme
        val theme = ConciergeThemeLoader.load(this, "my-theme")
        val surfaces = listOf("web://example.com/your-surface.html")
        
        val chatView = findViewById<ConciergeChatView>(R.id.concierge_chat)
        chatView.bind(
            lifecycleOwner = this,
            viewModelStoreOwner = this,
            surfaces = surfaces,
            theme = theme,
            onClose = { finish() }
        )
    }
}
`}</code></pre>
    <p><strong parentName="p">{`Important:`}</strong>{` The `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`ConciergeTheme`}</inlineCode>{` composable provides theme tokens to all child composables through CompositionLocal.`}</p>

    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-json"

  "metadata": {
    "brandName": "Concierge Demo",
    "version": "1.0.0",
    "language": "en-US",
    "namespace": "brand-concierge"
  },
  "behavior": {
    "multimodalCarousel": {
      "cardClickAction": "openLink",
      "carouselStyle": "paged"
    },
    "productCard": {
      "cardStyle": "actionButton"
    },
    "input": {
      "enableVoiceInput": true,
      "sendButtonStyle": "default",
      "disableMultiline": false,
      "showAiChatIcon": null
    },
    "chat": {
      "messageAlignment": "left",
      "messageWidth": "100%"
    },
    "privacyNotice": {
      "title": "Privacy Notice",
      "text": "Privacy notice text."
    },
    "feedback": {
      "displayMode": "action",
      "thumbsPlacement": "inline"
    },
    "citations": {
      "showLinkIcon": false
    },
    "welcomeCard": {
      "closeButtonAlignment": "start",
      "promptFullWidth": false,
      "promptMaxLines": 1,
      "contentAlignment": "top"
    }
  },
  "disclaimer": {
    "text": "AI responses may be inaccurate. Check answers and sources. {Terms}",
    "links": [
      {
        "text": "Terms",
        "url": "https://www.adobe.com/legal/licenses-terms/adobe-gen-ai-user-guidelines.html"
      }
    ]
  },
  "text": {
    "header.title": "Concierge",
    "header.subtitle": "Powered by Adobe",
    "welcome.heading": "Welcome to Brand Concierge!",
    "welcome.subheading": "I'm your personal guide to help you explore.",
    "input.placeholder": "How can I help?",
    "input.messageInput.aria": "Message input",
    "input.send.aria": "Send message",

    "input.mic.aria": "Voice input",
    "card.aria.select": "Select example message",
    "carousel.prev.aria": "Previous cards",
    "carousel.next.aria": "Next cards",
    "scroll.bottom.aria": "Scroll to bottom",
    "error.network": "I'm sorry, I'm having trouble connecting to our services right now.",
    "loading.message": "Generating response from our knowledge base...",
    "feedbackHelpfulLabel": "Was this helpful?",
    "sourcesLabel": "Sources",
    "feedback.dialog.title.positive": "Your feedback is appreciated",
    "feedback.dialog.title.negative": "Your feedback is appreciated",

    "--welcome-input-order": "3",
    "--welcome-cards-order": "2",

    "--welcome-title-font-size": "16px",

    <h2 {...{
      "id": "recommendations-for-theme-authors"
    }}>{`Recommendations for Theme Authors`}</h2>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "what-to-focus-on"
    }}>{`What to Focus On`}</h3>
    <p>{`When creating themes for the Android SDK, focus on these `}<strong parentName="p">{`actively used`}</strong>{` properties for the best results:`}</p>
    <p><strong parentName="p">{`Essential Colors (Highest Impact):`}</strong></p>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`--color-primary`}</inlineCode>{` - Primary brand color (used for buttons, feedback checkbox checked state, mic button icon, thinking animation)`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`--color-text`}</inlineCode>{` - Primary text color for main background (header, welcome card when theme loaded, prompt suggestions).`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`--main-container-background`}</inlineCode>{` - Main screen background color (welcome card, chat area, feedback dialog)`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`--main-container-bottom-background`}</inlineCode>{` - Bottom container background (input area)`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`--message-user-background`}</inlineCode>{` / `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`--message-user-text`}</inlineCode>{` - User message styling`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`--message-concierge-background`}</inlineCode>{` / `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`--message-concierge-text`}</inlineCode>{` - AI message styling, feedback dialog styling, feedback button icons, expanded citation text, chat footer (Sources label and icon)`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`--message-concierge-link-color`}</inlineCode>{` - Links in AI content and expanded citation URLs`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`--button-primary-background`}</inlineCode>{` / `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`--button-primary-text`}</inlineCode>{` - Primary buttons`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`--button-secondary-border`}</inlineCode>{` / `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`--button-secondary-text`}</inlineCode>{` - Secondary buttons`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`--input-background`}</inlineCode>{` / `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`--input-text-color`}</inlineCode>{` - Input field colors`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`--input-outline-color`}</inlineCode>{` / `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`--input-focus-outline-color`}</inlineCode>{` - Input borders`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`--input-send-icon-color`}</inlineCode>{` / `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`--input-mic-icon-color`}</inlineCode>{` - Send and mic button icon colors`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`--input-send-arrow-icon-color`}</inlineCode>{` / `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`--input-send-arrow-background-color`}</inlineCode>{` - Arrow send button colors (when `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`sendButtonStyle`}</inlineCode>{` is `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`"arrow"`}</inlineCode>{`)`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`--input-mic-recording-icon-color`}</inlineCode>{` - Waveform animation color during voice recording`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`--submit-button-fill-color`}</inlineCode>{` / `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`--color-button-submit`}</inlineCode>{` - Submit button`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`--disclaimer-color`}</inlineCode>{` / `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`--disclaimer-font-size`}</inlineCode>{` / `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`--disclaimer-font-weight`}</inlineCode>{` - Disclaimer text at bottom`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`--citations-background-color`}</inlineCode>{` / `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`--citations-text-color`}</inlineCode>{` - Citation pill (badge).`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`--feedback-icon-btn-background`}</inlineCode>{` - Feedback button styling`}</li>
    </ul>
    <p><strong parentName="p">{`Essential Text/Copy:`}</strong></p>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`text["header.title"]`}</inlineCode>{` - Header title`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`text["header.subtitle"]`}</inlineCode>{` - Header subtitle`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`text["welcome.heading"]`}</inlineCode>{` - Welcome screen title`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`text["welcome.subheading"]`}</inlineCode>{` - Welcome screen description`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`text["input.placeholder"]`}</inlineCode>{` - Input field hint`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`text["loading.message"]`}</inlineCode>{` - Loading indicator text`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`All `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`text["feedback.dialog.*"]`}</inlineCode>{` - Feedback dialog strings`}</li>
    </ul>
    <p><strong parentName="p">{`Essential Behavior:`}</strong></p>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`behavior.input.enableVoiceInput`}</inlineCode>{` - Show/hide microphone button`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`behavior.input.sendButtonStyle`}</inlineCode>{` - `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`"default"`}</inlineCode>{` (paper airplane) or `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`"arrow"`}</inlineCode>{` (filled circle with upward arrow)`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`behavior.productCard.cardStyle`}</inlineCode>{` - Use `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`"productDetail"`}</inlineCode>{` for extended product cards (image, badge, name, subtitle, price)`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`behavior.multimodalCarousel.carouselStyle`}</inlineCode>{` - Use `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`"paged"`}</inlineCode>{` for prev/next/dots or `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`"scroll"`}</inlineCode>{` for continuous scroll`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`behavior.welcomeCard.closeButtonAlignment`}</inlineCode>{` - Close button position (`}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`"start"`}</inlineCode>{` or `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`"end"`}</inlineCode>{`)`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`behavior.welcomeCard.promptFullWidth`}</inlineCode>{` - Full-width cards vs compact pill chips`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`behavior.welcomeCard.promptMaxLines`}</inlineCode>{` - Max prompt text lines (set `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`1`}</inlineCode>{` for uniform pills)`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`behavior.welcomeCard.contentAlignment`}</inlineCode>{` - Welcome card vertical position (`}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`"top"`}</inlineCode>{` or `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`"center"`}</inlineCode>{`)`}</li>
    </ul>
    <p><strong parentName="p">{`Essential Layout:`}</strong></p>
    <ul>
